creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 153940
v1

Helix has XBMC_PVR_MIN_API_VERSION set to 1.9.2 (not 1.9.0), reported in bug 198110 comment 2. I'm neither using the ports nor have PVR hardware, so my testing is limited to checking if addons are recognized and can be enabled in settings.

Maintainer upstreamed some patches
https://github.com/opdenkamp/xbmc-pvr-addons/commits/helix?author=decke
but one got backed out
https://github.com/opdenkamp/xbmc-pvr-addons/commit/e84c72b
